context: Tests whether the agent generates a TikTok Catalog Manager-compatible product feed with the correct file format (JSONL), the required fields, proper price formatting, and correct handling of description length and HTML stripping.

checklist.name: JSONL format
checklist.description: Output feed file uses JSON Lines format (one JSON object per line, NOT a JSON array)

checklist.name: Price format
checklist.description: The price field is formatted as 'XX.XX USD' with a space between the numeric amount and currency code (e.g. '29.99 USD', not '29.99USD' or '$29.99')

checklist.name: sku_id field
checklist.description: Each feed item includes a 'sku_id' field (not 'id', 'product_id', or 'variant_id')

checklist.name: availability values
checklist.description: The availability field uses exactly 'in stock' or 'out of stock' (not 'available', 'true/false', or similar)

checklist.name: condition field
checklist.description: Each feed item includes a 'condition' field set to 'new'

checklist.name: HTML stripped from description
checklist.description: HTML tags are removed from the product description before including it in the feed

checklist.name: Description max 1000 chars
checklist.description: Description is truncated to a maximum of 1000 characters

checklist.name: image_link field
checklist.description: Each feed item includes an 'image_link' field (not 'image', 'image_url', or 'photo')

checklist.name: google_product_category field
checklist.description: Each feed item includes a 'google_product_category' field

checklist.name: 24-hour sync setup
checklist.description: Documentation or instructions mention setting up auto-sync every 24 hours in TikTok Business Center

checklist.name: Business Center registration
checklist.description: Documentation references registering the feed URL in TikTok Business Center under Catalogs

checklist.name: Per-variant rows
checklist.description: Products with multiple variants generate one row per variant (not one row per product)
